milestones.title: Launched ChaiTalks.Tech
milestones.description: Started this blog to share what I learn and build. First posts explored vibe coding and the future of AI-assisted development.

milestones.title: Busy Beavers Deep Dive
milestones.description: Wrote a three-part series on the Busy Beaver problem — from Turing machines to the limits of computation. One of my favorite things I've written.

milestones.title: Explored MCP Protocol
milestones.description: Dove into the Model Context Protocol — wrote about integrating AI into applications and built an MCP server with Python and FastMCP.

milestones.title: Built VitaeVault
milestones.description: Created an AI-powered resume builder that tailors resumes to job descriptions. My first shipped side project on the chaitalks.tech domain.

milestones.title: Tesla HUD for Android
milestones.description: Turned an old Android phone into a heads-up display for my car — showing speed, speed limits, and navigation info in a Tesla-inspired minimal UI.

milestones.title: Automated Weekly Tech Digest
milestones.description: Built a system that automatically curates the week's top tech stories from Hacker News, summarizes them with AI, and publishes a digest every Sunday.
